why_1015021_is_harder_than_1012541.1015021_difference: L1HHV Hi-Viz is a specialized Hi-Visibility variant (fluorescent yellow cups, reflective tape) — narrower industrial use case. 1012541 is the standard L3H used in construction. Hi-Viz models typically have smaller distribution channels.
why_1015021_is_harder_than_1012541.distribution_gap: Hi-Viz safety models tend to go to large industrial clients via B2B, not retail shelf. Russian retail shelf carries standard (L3H, L1H, L2) more than Hi-Viz variants.
